{{Quote|Let's get that seine deployed; we're burning daylight.|Dunstal Noft|<ref name="GG2-1" />}}
'''Dunstal Noft''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Shistavanen/Legends|Shistavanen]] and [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]]. He eventually became a pilot for the [[Damarind Corporation]], captaining a [[Trawler/Legends|trawler]] that searched [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin Prime]] for [[Corusca gem/Legends|Corusca gems]].

==Biography==
Dunstal Noft was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Shistavanen/Legends|Shistavanen]] who turned to [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] and [[Pirate/Legends|piracy]] in his youth, alongside a large band of fellow Shistavanens. They operated in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], and were generally successful; they acquired a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on their heads, but Noft saw little of the profit and saw the risk factor grow every time their reputation increased. As part of a job, Noft was inserted into [[Damarind Fishing Station]] in the [[Yavin system/Legends|Yavin system]] in order to case the installation for a raid on the stored [[Corusca gem]]s. Noft established himself<ref name="GG2-2" /> as an independent [[Trawler/Legends|trawler]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]], and found that he could earn more money by legitimate work<ref name="GG2-1" /> that he could smuggling with his gang. He also enjoyed the independence of captaining his own ship.<ref name="GG2-2" />

Shortly after [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], Noft was due to report back to his gang but was considering leaving the smuggling life behind. He had also concluded that, due to the security measures in place on the station, raiding the station would be suicide. Noft also felt that his advice would be ignored, and the raid would take place anyway.<ref name="GG2-2" />

==Personality and traits==
Dunstal Noft was 1.81 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall,<ref name="GG2-1" /> and was considered to be tall for his [[Species/Legends|species]]. He was also an [[Albino/Legends|albino]].<ref name="GG2-2" /> Reserved, workmanlike, and self-assured,<ref name="GG2-1" /> Noft was also a being of honor despite his roguish nature.<ref name="GG2-2" /> If one of his [[Skiff/Legends|skiff]] pilots were in trouble, he would not hesitate to place his own life on the line to rescue them. There were times that Noft was sure that smuggling was the safer profession.<ref name="GG2-1" />

==Skills and abilities==
Noft was skilled in the use of a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] and [[Unarmed combat/Legends|unarmed combat]], and was an effective pilot and [[Astrogation/Legends|astrogator]].<ref name="GG2-1" />

==Equipment==
Noft wore a [[high-g suit]], armed himself with a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]], and carried a [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]] and [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]].<ref name="GG2-1" />
